title: Yoghurt loaf
excerpt: YOGHURT LOAVES Ingredients 10 ml Bicarbonate of soda 10 ml Honey 500 ml Natural Yoghurt 4 x 250 ml Stone-ground Whole Wheat Flour 5 ml Salt Optional: 125 ml Of any of the following: Rolled or crushed wheat Sunflower seeds Wheat germ Sesame seeds Method Preheat the oven to 180º …
html:
YOGHURT LOAVES

Ingredients

  • 10 ml Bicarbonate of soda
  • 10 ml Honey
  • 500 ml Natural Yoghurt
  • 4 x 250 ml Stone-ground Whole Wheat Flour
  • 5 ml Salt

 

Optional:

125 ml Of any of the following:

  • Rolled or crushed wheat
  • Sunflower seeds
  • Wheat germ
  • Sesame seeds

Method

  • Preheat the oven to 180º C.
  • Dissolve the bicarbonate of soda and honey in the yoghurt.
  • Now mix all the ingredients together.
  • Bake for 60 minutes in a well-greased bread pan.
  • You can also bake it in your muffin pans. The baking time will then be roughly 45 minutes. Test after 35 minutes to see if the skewer comes out clean.
  • Let it cool before slicing.
  • (Soured buttermilk can also be used instead of yoghurt.)
